message:
✨ Add aria-labels to GPU Reservations icon-only buttons (#1239)

- Add aria-label to drag handle, calendar add buttons, reservation bars,
  namespace close button, and remove resource button
- Add aria-hidden to decorative icons in tab buttons
- Fixes icon-only buttons flagged by Auto-QA accessibility scan

Fixes #1229, fixes #1230.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
